description: A compensation analytics package is needed for the HR Oracle database (host=localhost, port=1521, database=XEPDB1, username=hr, password=hr123). Create a PL/SQL package named HR_ANALYTICS containing a function DEPT_SALARY_STATS(p_dept_id IN NUMBER) returning a pipe-delimited string 'AVG:nnn|MIN:nnn|MAX:nnn', a procedure BUILD_COMPENSATION_MATRIX that creates or replaces a table COMPENSATION_MATRIX with columns EMPLOYEE_ID, FULL_NAME, JOB_TITLE, CURRENT_SALARY, DEPT_AVG_SALARY, SALARY_DEVIATION_PCT, and GRADE_LEVEL (from JOB_GRADES), and a function REPORTING_CHAIN(p_emp_id IN NUMBER) returning a pipe-delimited list of manager IDs up to the CEO. Export the results of the populated COMPENSATION_MATRIX table, ordered by EMPLOYEE_ID, to /home/ga/Desktop/compensation_matrix.txt.
